docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMIREZ, TRACEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON, CURTIS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED OCT-19-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, CURTIS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-09-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF TRACEY RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CURTIS JACKSON IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY, COURT DETERMINES THAT TIME OF THE THE BREACH OF CONTRACT IS WITHIN THE 4 YEARS STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS PERIOD. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECEIVED RE: DEFENDANT'S NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. "NO SUCH PERSON AT THIS ADDRESS" IS HANDWRITTEN ON THE ENVELOPE, WHICH WAS ENCLOSED IN ANOTHER ENVELOPE MAILED TO COURT. (PLACED IN FILE)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY RAMIREZ, TRACEY AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, CURTIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION, SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2020 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-09-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. (506)
